NEW FILM 🎥🏔️🇰🇬

Last June, I booked a super spontaneous trip to Kyrgyzstan with @gypsyinsneakers (who I had only met once before).
Luckily @ibraim.explorer took us in and I told him I want a super remote trip, no tourist, no civilization and he did exact my that.

7 days exploring Kyrgyzstan without seeing a single other tourist, 5 days of riding through the mountains and camping in the most scenic spots, endless encounters with amazing local families.

And now, I FINALLY made the film about this beautiful trip (one of my favorites so far)
A story about the mountains, horses and eagle hunters, told by the locals themselves 🐴🇰🇬

YT Link in Bio, or comment FILM and I’ll send you the link 🥰🫶🏼

Appreciate you guys! 🤍

#kyrgyzstan #kyrgyz #cinematic #femalefilmmaker #travel

When art meets tennis at @berlintennisopen 🎾🎨🎥

This is a day I will remember, and definitely a once-in-a-lifetime experience to see the legend @serenawilliams back on the court. It’s been a pleasure to enjoy watching some amazing tennis from @karolinamuchova , @eva.lys , and several others.

Vibes are fantastic here at Berlin Tennis Open. The community and crowd energy demonstrate what sports are truly about as they become part of the art I capture.

Hope you enjoy tennis through a lens of elegance and aesthetic 🎞️

#tennis #film #art #cinematography #berlin

4/10 on the list.

We dreamed so big that somehow it turned into flying a car through the sky…

Every episode of Chasing Flow State is about chasing ideas that seem impossible until they’re not. Making life feel like a video game, pushing limits, and proving that the craziest ideas are often worth pursuing. 🔥

Huge thank you to @gopro for believing in this vision from day one. Thank you to @curtisfreefly for building the most badass flying car imaginable. Thank you to @_joejennings_ , the legend himself, for capturing this masterpiece. And a massive thank you to the entire @r40.official crew for always being down to turn crazy ideas into reality. None of this happens without a team that’s willing to say “yes” when I pitch another ridiculous plan..

On to Episode 5 🚀

Unposted from Japan 🇯🇵 waking up at 4am to see this sunrise was definitely worth it! Mt Fuji is a gem. 

Another very early morning in Kyoto, but having this iconic place all to ourselves was epic 🫶

Everything is so cinematic in Japan, all the locals are the most perfect actors 🥹

Another lucky start of the day watching the sun rise over Mt Fuji 😍

We joined a tea ceremony in Kyoto and it was one of the highlights of our trip! The aesthetics were on point… 🍵

The famous bamboo forest near Kyoto! Soooo beautiful 🎋

Another random restaurant looking absolutely perfect for a blue hour shot 🥹

Tokyo is such a vibe. The city is full of cute restaurants and every corner feels cinematic. 🍣

Again, perfect timing with this local worker walking by 🥹👌

Of course Shibuya crossing had to be part of this post. Such a chaotic yet beautiful place in Tokyo! 

Thanks for watching until the end and see you soon for more adventures ❤️
Esto 🫀🌏🏝️✨

The great pyramid of Giza 🇪🇬
Growing up I was always fascinated by Egypt, the Pyramids and Egyptian mythology. So coming to Cairo, I had high expectations. Still got completely blown away by this place. The energy is unlike anything I have ever felt before. So we decided to go on a spontaneous sunrise mission to shoot this place a second time. Thanks to my talented friend @michaelespiro for these shots 
.
.
📸: @michaelespiro 
🎨: Escape LUT Pack (Comment “LUT”) #egypt #cairo #pyramids

El RF 15-35mm f2.8 ha sido mi principal objetivo estos años viajando por el mundo creando contenido. Es versátil, captura el movimiento de una manera única y muy immersiva, y lo uso tanto fuera como dentro del agua 📸

Aqui un reel resumen de algunos clips grabados con él y con la Canon R5, en Maldivas, Indonesia y la Polinesia Francesa. Sin duda el objetivo que me llevaría si sólo pudiera llevarme uno 🌏✈️🫰🏽
